title: Build a multi-agent system using ADK & MCP
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building a production-grade multi-agent system using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) with Gemini 3 Flash. The example application "Critics Cut" is a multilingual, context-aware AI assistant for media recommendations.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building a production-grade multi-agent system with Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the Model Context Protocol (MCP), running on Gemini 3 Flash. The build is demonstrated through "Critics Cut," a multilingual, context-aware AI assistant that helps users find content to watch. It shows how ADK and MCP fit together to coordinate multiple agents in a working application.
